expectations.text: Generates a valid dbt snapshot model with strategy='check'
expectations.evidence: The generated model uses strategy='check' with check_cols=['status','amount'].
Both dbt_valid_from and dbt_valid_to columns appear in the output.

expectations.text: Handles NULL values in check columns gracefully
expectations.evidence: No COALESCE or NULL-handling logic found for check columns; NULLs would cause missed change detection.
